name: WurmUnlimited
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install Wurm Unlimited with or without the Server-ModLauncher and run it.
(You can also copy over the 'Creative' or 'Adventure' folder if you want to create a Server with the provided Servertool that comes with the game)

ATTENTION: First Startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files!

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

ports.name: UDP2
ports.description: UDP Queryport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new UDP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...

ports.name: TCP2
ports.description: TCP Gameport (if you need another port, please delete this entry and create a new TCP Port with the required port number, also don't forget to click an 'Show more settings ...

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description:
The GAME_ID that the container download at startup.
(https://developer.valvesoftware.com/wiki/Dedicated_Servers_List)

variables.name: Validate Installation
variables.description: Set the Variable to 'true' if you want to validate the installation otherwise leave it blank.

variables.name: Enable Mod Launcher
variables.description: To enable the Server-ModLauncher set it to 'true' (without quotes) otherwise leave it blank.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Define the maximum players on the server

variables.name: Homeserver
variables.description: If set to 'true' (without quotes) Server is a homeserver and belongs to a single kingdom.

variables.name: HOMEKINGDOM
variables.description: If you're using the Adventure base, use 1, 2, or 3. || If you're using Creative, use 4. || Kingdom numbers: 0 - No kingdom | 1 - Jen-Kellon | 2 - Mol-Rehan | 3 - Horde of the Summoned | 4 - Freedom

variables.name: GAME_MODE
variables.description: Choose between 'Adventure' and 'Creative' (without quotes) or copy your own map to the root of the serverfolder and define the name of the mapfolder here

variables.name: LOGINSERVER
variables.description: If set to 'false' the server is intended to connect to another server who is the loginserver.

variables.name: EPICSETTINGS
variables.description: If set to true the server will follow the rules of the Epic servers in Wurm Online

variables.name: Extra Startup Parmeters
variables.description: Enter your extra start up commands for the server if needed.
